team_name: SWS-Sync — Bidirectional Interoperability Layer for SWS and Legacy Departments
summary: Design a layer for bidirectional interoperability between Karnataka's Single Window System and legacy department systems using UBID as the common join key.
key_steps: Implement lightweight adapters for each department system
Use durable bus for propagating canonical events keyed and ordered by UBID
Develop schema translator driven by declarative mapping files
Enforce idempotency through deterministic event IDs
Configure conflict resolver policies and capture audit logs
constraints_addressed: Hot-reloadable conflict policies for governance teams
